markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and publication cadence for Gitpod's blog, addressing recent changes and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gitpod temporarily removed AI-focused content from their blog due to brand positioning concerns](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Shifting to a bi-weekly content delivery schedule (10 posts every 2 weeks) to better manage review processes](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Focus on dev productivity and security topics, avoiding AI/automation content for now](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Site performance shows positive trends (17k impressions, improved avg. position) despite recent content removals](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

## Topics

### Content Publication Status

  - [10 articles published, but some removed from blog search](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [AI-focused content pulled due to internal discussions on messaging](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Remaining content still live but not easily accessible](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Impressions decreased due to content removal and limited published articles](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

### Website Structure and Authorship Challenges

  - [Gitpod reviewing website structure, lacking ability to categorize posts](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Authorship concerns: balancing quality expectations with SEO needs](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Exploring solutions like placeholder names or team attribution](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Seeking insights from GrowthX on how other clients handle similar challenges](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Content Delivery and Review Process

  - [Shifting to bi-weekly content delivery (10 posts every 2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [New schedule: GrowthX to deliver content by EOD Thursday, Gitpod to review on Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Maintaining Wednesday sync meetings to discuss feedback](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Aiming for more manageable review process for Gitpod team](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)

### Content Focus and Topics

  - [Avoiding AI/automation category unless it fits better elsewhere](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Focusing on productivity and security topics](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Tool-specific content (e.g., Markdown, VS Code) less relevant; case-by-case review needed](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Site Performance

  - [Overall positive trajectory: 17k impressions, improved average position](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Some volatility expected due to recent Google core update (1-2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Top performing pieces: "How AI shapes dev efficiency and strategic value" (clicks), "How to troubleshoot and fix setup issues in Python data science" (impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver next batch of 10 posts two weeks from this Friday](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Gitpod to review current 9 posts in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose 10 new topics for next delivery](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Gitpod to aim for republishing removed content on blog after repositioning](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise any content not aligning with Gitpod's AI positioning upon request](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Continue monitoring site performance during post-update volatility period](https://fathom.video/share/UUujTQcGsDm7wzvfeizftyvnsyXnhfgP?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
